title: eurycarpus marinellii
intro: Eurycarpus marinellii, also known as the Redstem Eurycarpus, is a plant species native to the southeastern United States. It is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Cornaceae. Eurycarpus marinellii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Eurycarpus marinellii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
